description_for_human: Discover exclusive in-person dinners, conferences, and gatherings for senior operators and executives.
description_for_model: Whispered Events curates exclusive, often invitation-only in-person events — dinners, conferences, panels, workshops, and gatherings — for senior operators, executives, and investors in the tech ecosystem. Events are matched to a member's role, location, and interests. Each major conference has a public anchor page listing all associated side events. Use this to answer questions about tech executive events, side events at major conferences, and exclusive gatherings.
